name: growth
description: SEO (meta/OGP/JSON-LD/heading hierarchy), SMO (social sharing), CRO (CTA/form/exit-intent), and GEO (AI citation optimization) across four pillars. Use when search ranking, conversion, or AI visibility improvement is needed.
tagline: Traffic without conversion is just expensive vanity.

capabilities.summary: Title, description, canonical, robots meta tags per page
Open Graph Protocol and Twitter Card meta for social sharing
Schema.org structured data (Article, Product, FAQ, Organization) with stacked schema for AI citation
LCP ≤2.5s, INP <200ms, CLS <0.1 identification and improvement at p75; VSI tracking for session-long stability when available

Generative Engine Optimization for AI Overviews/ChatGPT/Perplexity/Copilot citation with four-signal framework (retrievability, extractability, credibility, entity clarity), AI crawler bot taxonomy (training vs search/retrieval), platform-specific tactics, and GEO KPI measurement (Mention Rate, Citation Rate, Share of Voice)
Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness markup and content structure
CTA copy, placement, color, urgency improvements with hypothesis-driven testing

recipes.label: SEO
recipes.when: Meta tags, JSON-LD, heading hierarchy, GEO optimization

recipes.label: CRO
recipes.when: CTA optimization, form improvements, exit intent

recipes.label: GEO
recipes.when: AI Overview / ChatGPT / Perplexity citation optimization

recipes.label: Keyword
recipes.when: Keyword research methodology — search intent classification, query clustering, SERP feature analysis, AI prompt mining

recipes.label: Audit
recipes.when: Full-site SEO audit — crawlability, indexability, content gap, internal linking, log-file analysis

recipes.label: Vitals
recipes.when: Core Web Vitals deep optimization — LCP/INP/CLS root-cause and targeted fix patterns at p75
